report:
- Workspace root: /Users/me/var/agent-workspaces/EAJbtEjrFiU2NfC6cvr5
- Git remote: origin -> git@github.com:juequinterore/aconcagua.git (issue_json did not include a git.repository to compare against; no mismatch check applied)
- Branch: chore/add_visible_link_to_blog (clean tracked tree; one untracked file bitbucket-api.sh outside the spec scope)
- Project type: single Astro v5.17.3 static-site package, three locales (es default, en, zh), Firebase Hosting; no test suite, no linter
- Authoritative validation gate: npm run build (runs @astrojs/check + astro build)
- Documentation: used existing docs/PROJECT.md (comprehensive); no new docs/PROJECT.md created
- Spec written to specs/feat-1089-issue-na-add-blog-link.md
- Exposure surfaces wired up: src/components/Nav.astro (desktop nav + mobile overlay, single navLinks array drives both) AND src/components/Footer.astro (Navigation column, separate hardcoded navLinks array) AND all three i18n dictionaries (es.ts, en.ts, zh.ts) with new keys nav.blog, nav.blog_aria_external, nav.blog_url
- Design choice: append Blog as the last entry in both nav arrays, mark with external:true to trigger target=_blank, rel=noopener noreferrer, localized aria-label '(opens in a new tab)' suffix, and an inline em-sized arrow SVG glyph (currentColor, opacity 0.6 -> 1 on hover, 200 ms) for an unobtrusive but discoverable off-site cue
- No new dependencies, no new pages, no new redirects, no /blog route on this site (target is the external subdomain blog.aconcagua.co)
- Remaining assumptions: none load-bearing; the only minor judgement call is the Chinese translation '博客' for the label and '（在新标签页中打开）' for the aria-suffix, both standard renderings
